projects.title: Job Radar
projects.description: A fully automated job-hunting dashboard that scrapes 30+ companies across three pipelines, scores results against a personal skill profile using regex gating and Gemini LLM analysis, and delivers filtered, ranked listings via a scheduled cron job and emails relevant jobupdates automatically

projects.title: ECHO FM
projects.description: a fully autonomous, full-stack news commentary pipeline. It uses advanced neural models to ingest global news, analyze historical patterns, and broadcast sarcastic, witty audio-visual transmissions to the digital grid.
